title: Synthesis and Vibrational Identification of the Uranyl Peroxodicarbonate [UO2(O2)(CO3)3]4-: Insights into Peroxo-Carbonate Bonding from 18O Labeling, DFT and QTAIM analysis
abstract: In carbonate-rich aqueous environments relevant to spent nuclear fuel storage, the coexistence of carbonate species and radiolytically generated H2O2 is expected to promote the formation of uranyl peroxo-carbonate complexes under mild conditions.

title: Symmetric VSEPR Geometries from Energy Minimization on a Sphere
abstract: The basic VSEPR molecular geometries are derived by treating electron domains as identical repelling charges constrained to a sphere.
